segments.text: Take Aaron and his sons with him, and the garments, and the anointing oil, and a bullock for the sin offering, and two rams, and a basket of unleavened bread
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: gather thou all the congregation together unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Moses did as the LORD commanded him; and the assembly was gathered together unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation
This is the thing which the LORD commanded to be done
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Moses brought Aaron and his sons, and washed them with water

He put upon him the coat, and girded him with the girdle, and clothed him with the robe, and put the ephod upon him, and he girded him with the curious girdle of the ephod, and bound it unto him therewith
He put the breastplate upon him: also he put in the breastplate the Urim and the Thummim
He put the mitre upon his head; also upon the mitre, even upon his forefront, did he put the golden plate, the holy crown; as the LORD commanded Moses
He brought the ram for the burnt offering: and Aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram
He brought the other ram, the ram of consecration: and Aaron and his sons laid their hands upon the head of the ram
Moses said unto Aaron and to his sons,
Boil the flesh at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation: and there eat it with the bread that is in the basket of consecrations, as I commanded, saying, Aaron and his sons shall eat it
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Moses brought Aaron's sons, and put coats upon them, and girded them with girdles, and put bonnets upon them; as the LORD commanded Moses
